title: M.M.A.B.S
description: M.M.A.B.S : More mining and building stuff. Currently working on the 1.1 wich adds "building stuff", 1.2 will add "mining stuff". This mod mainly adds industrial stuff.
body:
# Announcement
I am not working on this mod anymore. There's a bug which i dont know how to fix, i'll send the console on the discord server. It is very annoying for me, i had a lot plans for upcoming mod updates. I will make another mod for building only.

### 01/10/26
I'll be releasing some indev versions of the new mod on modrinth (soon).

#  Mod info (read before reporting a bug)
This mod was made by Dmods (aka DartinRx's mods)
It is mostly based on industrial mining & building stuff.

### Planned updates for 1.1
### ?/?/?
- Add industrial wall blocks/normal blocks and more
- Add custom sounds
- In progress...
### 01/10/26
- Find and fix the error that glitched the entire mod
- Cut door sounds

## Other
I made this mod for pure fun, it does contain a lot of bugs that i will fix if i can.
The bugs that you do not need to report to me :
- Oil bucket bug (Cannot place oil on the side of blocks.)
- ~~Double~~ **Uncutted** Door sounds (Note from 01/10/26 : i actually know how to fix this bug now, but because something glitched in the mod, i cannot update it.)
- Blocks making wayyy too much particles and lagging when broken

The road marking slabs are broken, expect them being fixed in the next update.

Since this is my first ever mod, it is unprofessional.

### Discord server link
Report bugs here or suggest new things i should add to my mod.
[https://discord.gg/hqp7xSw2ED](https://discord.gg/hqp7xSw2ED)

I will (probably) make a small wiki about my mod when i am going to be officially releasing it.
